component.name: files-signer
component.summary: Sign, verify and extract files with digital signatures

description.p: files-signer signs and verifies files of any type (PDF, YAML, JAR, ZIP, Dockerfiles, plain text, and so on) using standard PKCS#7/CMS digital signatures and a PEM certificate. It is a cross-platform alternative to XolidoSign that runs on Windows, Linux and macOS, with both a desktop app and a command-line interface.

ul.li: Verify integrity and signer identity, with optional trust-chain validation.
Recover the original file embedded in an attached (.p7m) signature.
Password-protected PEM keys and batch signing.

description.p: First release: CLI + desktop app to sign, verify and extract files.
